cases.name: membership-fixture-four
cases.note: the standard four-member fixture snapshot; root binds key and both weights per member

cases.name: membership-tiebreak-cut-at-256
cases.note: 300 equal-weight candidates: exactly the 256 with the smallest NOOS/WITNESS/TIEBREAK/V1 hashes are active

cases.name: membership-eligibility-filters
cases.note: below-minimum bond and not-yet-active candidates are excluded before selection

cases.name: membership-cap-repair-by-admission
cases.note: one 3e6 whale over 400 x 20k: the top-256 set violates the one-third cap; reserve admission in sample order repairs it

cases.name: membership-unrepairable-halts
cases.note: a single candidate always holds 100% >= one third; with no previous set the ring HALTS (never normalizes an unsafe set)
